waGeneric: Hi! I came from your website and would love details and to order a mezuzah :)
heroOverline: Handmade · Real olive wood & epoxy resin
heroTitleC: protection that begins at your doorway
heroLead: Handmade mezuzah cases combining real olive wood and epoxy resin in stunning colors. Each piece is created individually — no two are alike, just like your home.
catSub: Launch prices for a limited time. All prices are for handmade mezuzah cases.
why1Desc: Hand-worked and polished, with a natural tone and texture that has no substitute.
why2Desc: Hand-cast in rich, durable colors — a color that won't fade over time.
why3Desc: Every mezuzah is created individually. The one you receive is yours alone.
c1Desc: Our premium model: a stunning blend of real olive wood and epoxy resin in a rich color, with a golden Shin letter. A regal presence on any doorway. Available in a variety of colors — blue, green, white and more.
c1Wa: Hi! I'd like to order: Olive Wood & Epoxy – Large Edition (15 cm), 250 ₪ :)
c2Desc: All the beauty and quality of the epoxy model, in the classic size that fits most homes. Olive wood and colored resin that won't fade — a unique piece for every door.
c2Wa: Hi! I'd like to order: Olive Wood & Epoxy – Classic (12 cm), 200 ₪ :)
c3Desc: For lovers of the natural and clean: solid olive wood in a warm tone, polished and coated for years of protection. Elegant simplicity with a golden Shin letter.
c3Wa: Hi! I'd like to order: Natural Olive Wood mezuzah, 150 ₪ :)
c4Desc: Mezuzah cases of clear epoxy and wood that have warmed slightly in tone over time — a small cosmetic flaw at a price you won't find anywhere else. The product is fully intact.
c4Note: * This does not happen with the colored epoxy models.
c4Wa: Hi! I'd like to order a piece from the Bargain Corner (Outlet), 100 ₪ :)
bannerTitle: Because every home has its own character
bannerText: From deep blue, through earthy green, to pearl white — choose the shade that speaks to you.
bannerWa: Hi! I'd love a personal chat and help choosing a color for a mezuzah :)
galleryTitle: Every mezuzah — a story of its own
gallerySub: A peek at the collection. Thanks to the natural wood and hand-casting, the piece you receive will be entirely unique — yours alone.
cap1: Natural olive wood — no two pieces alike
rev1Text: I received the mezuzah and it's simply beautiful — exactly like the photos, even better. Perfect handiwork.
rev2Text: The service is personal and the product is on another level. I hung them all over the house.
rev3Text: A gift everyone admired. There's nothing like real handmade work.
faq1Q: Does the price include a klaf (scroll)?
faq1A: The price is for the mezuzah case only. We'll be happy to recommend where to get a kosher klaf. [edit as needed]
faq2Q: How long until I get my order?
faq2A: Delivery time is 3–5 business days, with nationwide shipping. [edit as needed]
faq3A: Absolutely! The colored models are available in a range of shades. Message us on WhatsApp and the color you choose will be prepared for you.
giftTitle: The perfect gift for a housewarming, wedding and special occasion
giftText: Looking for a meaningful gift? A handmade mezuzah is a personal, luxurious and unforgettable gift. We'll wrap it for you in elegant gift packaging with a personal blessing — ready to surprise.
giftWa: Hi! I'd like to order a mezuzah as a gift (housewarming/wedding) with gift wrapping and a blessing :)
finalTitle: Ready to set up your mezuzah?
finalText: Send one message on WhatsApp — we'll help you choose the perfect model and color, and make sure your mezuzah arrives packed and ready to hang.
finalReassure: Personal & fast service · Handmade · One-of-a-kind · Nationwide shipping
finalWa: Hi! I'd like to order a mezuzah and get help choosing a model and color :)
footerCopy: © The Mezuzah House — handmade olive wood & epoxy mezuzah cases
footerWa: Hi! I'd love details about handmade mezuzah cases :)
announceText: Limited-time launch offer · Free shipping over ₪200 · Nationwide shipping
pickerTitle: Choose a specific mezuzah from our stock
pickerIntro: Each photo shows several mezuzahs available in stock. Choose the exact piece you love — and order it on WhatsApp or pay for it directly on the site.
pickerSelectBtn: Choose a piece from the photo
pickerHint: Tip: click the number next to the mezuzah you chose in the photo
payNote: Secure payment. After payment we'll contact you to arrange shipping.
cartEmpty: Your cart is empty. Choose mezuzahs from the 'Choose a Mezuzah' section.
coSuccess: Your order has been received! We'll contact you shortly to arrange shipping and payment.
coRequiredNote: Required fields: name, phone and address.
seoTitle: Handmade Olive Wood & Epoxy Mezuzah Cases | The Mezuzah House
seoDescription: Luxury handmade mezuzah cases combining real olive wood and epoxy resin in stunning colors. Launch offer, gift wrapping and nationwide shipping. Quick order on WhatsApp.
waAskPrefix: Hi! I'd like to buy a specific mezuzah:
orderHello: Hi! I'd like to place an order:
successWaSuffix: (also opening WhatsApp to send the details)
